title: Self-iteration loop, late turn; own prior sign-off already says it (Duplicate)
failure_mode: no Duplicate suppressor; the agent re-SPEAKs satisfaction its own prior message already stated, keeping the convergence loop alive past its termination condition (FR-021)
invariant: Duplicate suppressor PASSes a late iteration turn when the agent's own prior message already says the planned content
rationale: Late in the 'iterate until you're all happy' loop, Dalgos's own prior turn already signed off on the final draft. Another satisfied-review message would repeat itself; the honest verdict is PASS via Duplicate.
